content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 25, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 25 focused on enhancing the Electrobun desktop experience, refining agent communication logic, and improving system reliability. Key updates include managed window surfaces for apps, fixes for agent message leaking, and improved handling of planner actions and character management.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Desktop & App Surface Enhancements**
*   Implemented managed desktop windows for app catalog selections using Electrobun, ensuring detached windows maintain page-scoped chat and control context. [#7092](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7092)

**Agent Communication & Planner Logic**
*   Prevented internal mechanism words from leaking into transient-failure replies. [#7098](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7098)
*   Improved message handling by dropping passive bookkeeping actions when delegation owns the turn and ensuring swarm synthesis results are delivered to the triggering room. [#7097](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7097), [#7090](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7090)
*   Added tolerance for malformed planner action XML to prevent failures on unclosed tags. [#7099](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7099)

**System Reliability & Credential Management**
*   Fixed an issue where the workbench task list leaked internal scheduler tasks into chat. [#7095](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7095)
*   Resolved credential conflicts between Claude Code CLI and in-app OAuth. [#7094](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7094)
*   Enabled proper propagation of character renames by tokenizing name occurrences on save. [#7101](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7101)

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#7100](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7100): feat(agent): x402 paid plugin routes and test harness hardening.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
